title: Excalibur Mod
body:
![Excalibur Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b7401a45fc7e1da8a041a23673f69d57eb638ac.png)

# Have you ever heard of the great sword Excalibur? If so, this is a perfect mod for you to get this sword.

1. ### To obtain Excalibur you need resources that the mod provides -
2. ### One of them is Mentalibur -

# Mentalibur

Mentalibur is a sword found fixed in a stone, to be able to get this sword out of the stone, you must meet the following requirements:

1. Make sure your XP (Level) is at or above 50.
2. Make sure your life, hunger and saturation are at maximum, so you will be more willing to draw the sword.
3. One of the most difficult is the last one, you will need an achievement called (Kill all Mobs) that is, you will have to eliminate all Mobs, Animals and Creatures.

With all the requirements met, a message will appear in the middle of the screen saying that you are allowed to hold the Mentalibur

If you do not meet the requirements, a red message will appear saying that you are not allowed to hold the mentalibur.
